intro.title: LUNARIA
lore: Before the world there was the Veil of Possibility.
Four forces met: Fire, Water, Earth and Air.
From their balance the island of Lunaria was born.
On it the first Axies awoke, each with a unique SOUL.
Every birth is an echo of the myth. An identity like no other.
intro.ariaLabel: Lunaria intro. Press start to enter Houston.
